creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
Paul Dokas wrote on 09.07.2012 16:59:
> On 07/09/12 03:49, rm@FreeBSD.org wrote:
>> Synopsis: updated ports for Bro and new ports for broccoli and broctl
>>
>> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
>> State-Changed-By: rm
>> State-Changed-When: Mon Jul 9 08:49:24 UTC 2012
>> State-Changed-Why:
>> Hi Paul! Would you please submit security/bro patch as unified diff and
>> new ports as shell archives as described there:
>> http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/book.html#PORTING-SUBMITTING
>> ? Just attach them to your response email and they will be added to this
>> PR. Thank you.
>>
>> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=169690
>
>
> The diff and shar files are attached.
>
> Paul
>

Paul, thank you for a quick response. The only problem - diff seems to 
be reverted (it actually downgrades security/bro from 2.0 to 1.5). You 
need to invoke diff like that:

diff -ruNa bro.old/ bro.new/ > bro.diff

to produce the correct patch. Please fix, thank you in advance!

PS. Please keep bug-followup@ in cc:, I was wrong to recommend you to 
just response to this message. Sorry.

-- 
Regards,
Ruslan

Tinderboxing kills... the drives.
